reference: Hello, your light three-day period may be a result of the discontinuation of the pill, especially if the period came on or before the expected date. However, to be sure, you could get a serum beta human chorionic gonadotropin test or a simpler urine pregnancy test done and visit your gynecologist if the result is positive.
text: Hello, your light three-day period may be a result of the discontinuation of the pill, especially if the period came on or before the expected date. However, to be sure, you could get a serum beta-human chorionic gonadotropin test or a simpler urine pregnancy test done, and visit your gynecologist if the result is positive.
